MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY'S Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the Health and Safety Code.

The court signed the proposed order and proposed judgment submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
